EmailTemplate.name: Fidem Customer Notification Template
EmailTemplate.subject: Your monthly statement is now available
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
We wanted to let you know that your monthly statement is now available. You can view your statement by logging in to your account at https://mycard.fidemfinance.ca/.
If you haven’t yet registered for paperless statements, signing up is easy. Click here to go paperless at https://mycard.fidemfinance.ca/
Accessing your monthly statements gets you easy, fast access to your account activity and payment information – no waiting for your monthly statement. Less paper means less clutter and your statements will now be in be in one place and easy to access.
If you have any questions about your account, contact us at accountmanagment@fidemfinance.ca or give us a call at 1-800-259-1167.
Sincerely
Account Management Team Fidem Finance
To unsubscribe to these emails, please reply unsubscribe to this email and we will remove you from our mailing list. Fidem Mastercard®Card is issued by Peoples Trust Company under license from Mastercard International Incorporated. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated.
